rationale: Educ. Code §32.258 governs a student assessment data portal and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on this statute.
quote: The agency shall establish and maintain a student assessment data portal for use by school districts, teachers, parents, students, and public institutions of higher education.
_note: Rule text concerns student assessment data systems; no textual connection to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value.
